nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 婆罗洲
nodes.summary: 婆罗洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联91种鸟类，包括菲律宾冢雉、Bornean crestless fireback、红头林鹧鸪等91种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 理查德·鮑德勒·夏普
nodes.summary: 理查德·鮑德勒·夏普是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联33种鸟类，包括白眉田雞、Bates's nightjar、Bates's swift等33种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 京那巴鲁山
nodes.summary: 京那巴鲁山是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Cave swiftlet、Scarlet-rumped trogon、丽绿阔嘴鸟等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 丽绿阔嘴鸟
nodes.summary: 丽绿阔嘴鸟（Hose's broadbill，学名 Calyptomena hosii），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联6个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: Müller Mountains
nodes.summary: Müller Mountains是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括丽绿阔嘴鸟、Bornean stubtail，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 加央孟他讓國家公園
nodes.summary: 加央孟他讓國家公園是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括丽绿阔嘴鸟、黑喉绿阔嘴鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Cape Mangkalihat
nodes.summary: Cape Mangkalihat, also known as Cape Sangkulirang, is a cape in eastern Borneo.

links.key: bird-丽绿阔嘴鸟-2cf94251__distributed_in__loc-理查德-鮑德勒-夏普-4be661e4
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Hose's broadbill (Calyptomena hosii) is a species of bird in the family Calyptomenidae

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species is endemic to montane regions in north, central, and southeastern Borneo, where it mostly occurs in forests at elevations of

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Endemic to the island of Borneo, Hose's broadbill inhabits the northern and central parts of the island, where it is found discontinuously from Mount Kinabalu to the Müller Mountains, Kayan Mentarang, the Dulit Range, the Sambaliung Mountains, and the Sangkulirang Peninsula

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Endemic to the island of Borneo, Hose's broadbill inhabits the northern and central parts of the island, where it is found discontinuously from Mount Kinabalu to the Müller Mountains, Kayan Mentarang, the Dulit Range, the Sambaliung Mountains, and the Sangkulirang Peninsula

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It may be locally migratory depending on the fruiting seasons of trees it feeds on. Hose's broadbill is mainly found on hill slopes, inhabiting dipterocarp forest, lower montane forest, lowland forest on hills, and forests with limestone pinnacles (rock columns)

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is classified as being near-threatened by the International Union for Conservation of Nature due to a moderately rapid decline in its population caused by habitat destruction
